channel.title: soggyfurby TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from soggyfurby

item.title: paintings, tattoos, and press on nails 🫡🤩 I also earned four certificates from Harvard University this month, your girl been busy 🥸 #sportbike #yamahar6 #glittergoth #bikergirl #bikelife

item.title: Idk if I can't read or that was misleading I'm CRYIG 🤣🤣😭#spain #madrid #glittergoth #motovlog #idontspeakspanish @Kev650
item.description: Idk if I can't read or that was misleading I'm CRYIG 🤣🤣😭#spain #madrid #glittergoth #motovlog #idontspeakspanish @Kev650
item.author: soggyfurby

item.title: Spain was very beautiful and interesting ✈️ lots of new foods and... I'm still not over the fact you eat eggs with beer at all hours of the night 😳😭 #motovlog #glittergoth #madrid #spain #bikergirl @Kev650
item.description: Spain was very beautiful and interesting ✈️ lots of new foods and... I'm still not over the fact you eat eggs with beer at all hours of the night 😳😭 #motovlog #glittergoth #madrid #spain #bikergirl @Kev650
item.author: soggyfurby

item.title: and some good vibes from Versace and PHX rides of course. ✨🧚🏼‍♀️🚬 #bikergirl #madrid #glittergoth #motovlog #sportbike
item.description: and some good vibes from Versace and PHX rides of course. ✨🧚🏼‍♀️🚬 #bikergirl #madrid #glittergoth #motovlog #sportbike
item.author: soggyfurby

item.title: I'm honestly so tired of old men that are closer to expiring than ever reaching a peak in their life, getting mad at young girls for literally anything. God forbid the bar back wants to take a break!? or walk away when customers are treating me terribly l
item.description: I'm honestly so tired of old men that are closer to expiring than ever reaching a peak in their life, getting mad at young girls for literally anything. God forbid the bar back wants to take a break!? or walk away when customers are treating me terribly l
item.author: soggyfurby

item.title: lmao stay safe out there 🤷🏼‍♀️🩰✨ #tattooartist #bikergirl #sportbike #glittergoth #motovlog

item.title: I'm still mad about it eating both of my wheels 🙂 Arizona said they would be harsher consequences for leaving debris in the highways, but I'm not seeing it. and tell me why I drove past it for the past week when I called state troopers to report this they
item.description: I'm still mad about it eating both of my wheels 🙂 Arizona said they would be harsher consequences for leaving debris in the highways, but I'm not seeing it. and tell me why I drove past it for the past week when I called state troopers to report this they
item.author: soggyfurby

item.author: soggyfurby

item.title: unfortunately I hate loud noises and that was like ... a grenade inside a tank bro pls 😂 I swear I'm not mean it was too much noise 🤣😛 @Sidewinder_z we been werkinn #glittergoth #yamaha #sportbike #bikergirl #tattooartist
item.description: unfortunately I hate loud noises and that was like ... a grenade inside a tank bro pls 😂 I swear I'm not mean it was too much noise 🤣😛 @Sidewinder_z we been werkinn #glittergoth #yamaha #sportbike #bikergirl #tattooartist
item.author: soggyfurby

item.title: De er så fine 😍 det BESTE settet jeg noensinne har laget. Første gang jeg bruker akrylmaling! Jeg gleder meg til å begynne på negleskolen slik at jeg kan få unnagjort forberedelsene. Jeg skulle gjerne sett at neglene mine sluttet å løfte seg!! ** Jeg bruk
item.description: De er så fine 😍 det BESTE settet jeg noensinne har laget. Første gang jeg bruker akrylmaling! Jeg gleder meg til å begynne på negleskolen slik at jeg kan få unnagjort forberedelsene. Jeg skulle gjerne sett at neglene mine sluttet å løfte seg!! ** Jeg bruk
item.author: soggyfurby

item.title: his nail and tattoo are healed/ grown out hehehe 😘 your idea or mine, let's make it happen 🩵 mobile artist in PHX and OSL :) #nailart #acrylicnailsdesign #nailprogress #tattooartist #glittergoth

item.title: Jeg er ærlig talt overrasket over at det ikke er flere ulykker med alle disse gamle folk på veiene. #glittergoth #tattooartist #bikergirl #sportbike #motovlog
